parameters.prompt: One isolated shallow rectangular orbital-station floor panel, exactly 2.4 m wide, 3.0 m long and only 0.22 m thick. Flat load-bearing underside; top has a framed non-slip walking surface, flush cargo tie-down sockets, two narrow utility channels, sealed access covers, threshold-compatible edges, panel gaps and fasteners. Slab only, thickness less than 8 percent of length, clear uninterrupted 1.5 m central walking strip, top faces +Y. No wall, ceiling, room, furniture, raised obstacle, loose cable, text, logo, stand, ground or background.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit station deck: dark graphite non-slip panels, zinc-gray frame, brushed steel tie-downs, restrained amber edge inlays without symbols and localized foot wear. No baked lighting, pseudo-text, logos, broad dirt, labels or emissive glow.

strengths: single connected shallow slab with a 0.043 thickness-to-length ratio
clear uninterrupted center region and bounded edge/service detail
silhouette can normalize to the authored 2.4 x 3.0 x 0.22 m deck envelope
required_cleanup: verify the top face and walking strip after axis normalization
author walkability, collision and tie-down sockets independently of render geometry
